title: oxybaphus expansus
intro: Oxybaphus expansus, also known as the desert trumpet or hummingbird trumpet, is a flowering plant species native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and improve digestion. The health benefits of Oxybaphus expansus include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve heart health, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and stress. In herbal preparations, Oxybaphus expansus is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
